match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_1",
    "title": "Studio Lipstick Reveal",
    "storyBeat": "Introduction of product and character in serene studio setting",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, serene and effortlessly cool morning mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_2",
    "title": "Macro Lip Application",
    "storyBeat": "Detailed product application close-up",
    "durationSeconds": 5,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, high-key and effortlessly cool with immediate light feel"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_3",
    "title": "Promenade Walk",
    "storyBeat": "Character moves confidently through coastal environment showcasing lifestyle",
    "durationSeconds": 7,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal energy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_4",
    "title": "Shoreline Moment and Final Wide",
    "storyBeat": "Climactic product placement and expansive finale shot",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE",
    "timeOfDay": "golden hour",
    "visualSummary": "Playful summery freedom effortless cool coastal lifestyle"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
